Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 7, standard Linux home directory path
Web search confirmed Solent center at 50.7853°N, task datum 50.765°N is approximately 2km south within Solent bounds. https://latitude.to/articles-by-country/gb/united-kingdom/6146/solent
Web search confirmed Solent center at -1.2903°W, task datum -1.295°W is approximately 500m west within Solent bounds. https://latitude.to/articles-by-country/gb/united-kingdom/6146/solent

pi_items.verified_value: Coastguard SAR helicopters with Whiskey Bravo (G-BPWB) callsigns are real UK Coast Guard assets
pi_items.source: Web search found G-BPWB (Whiskey Bravo) was a UK Coastguard SAR helicopter. https://www.key.aero/forum/commercial-aviation/39934-uk-coastguard-g-bpwb-whiskey-bravo-callsign

pi_items.verified_value: Atlantic 85 is a real RNLI B-class rigid inflatable lifeboat (RIB), approximately 8.5m long, top speed 35 knots
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed Atlantic 85-class lifeboats are operational RNLI vessels. https://rnli.org/what-we-do/lifeboats-and-stations/our-lifeboat-fleet/b-class-lifeboat

pi_items.verified_value: MV Sea Guardian exists as a bulk carrier (IMO 9427902), but no verification of specific SAR operational role
pi_items.source: Web search found MV Sea Guardian bulk carrier registered with MarineTraffic. https://www.vesselfinder.com/vessels/details/9427902

pi_items.verified_value: STAR DORADO exists as a bulk carrier (IMO 9594614), but SY Dorado Star yacht not specifically found
pi_items.source: Web search returned STAR DORADO bulk carrier but no specific SY Dorado Star yacht vessel

pi_items.verified_value: Expanding Square Search is a standard IAMSAR maritime search and rescue pattern featuring concentric square spirals with 90-degree turns
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed Expanding Square is a real SAR search pattern used in IAMSAR procedures. https://owaysonline.com/iamsar-search-patterns/

Web search on SAR patterns confirms expanding square patterns typically use multiple legs with 90-degree turns every 2 legs. 6 legs provides 3 complete turns, consistent with SAR pattern requirements.

privileged_info_summary: The Solent is a real strait between Hampshire and the Isle of Wight in the UK. The task's datum coordinates (50.765°N, -1.295°W) fall within the Solent area, approximately 2km south and 500m west of the Solent's approximate center. The Expanding Square Search is a verified IAMSAR maritime search and rescue pattern used in real SAR operations. The RNLI Severn Class 17-35 and Atlantic 85 B-class lifeboats are real operational vessels. UK Coastguard operates SAR helicopters with Whiskey Bravo callsigns. Bridge Command is a real open-source maritime simulator supporting ARPA and radar configuration via bc5.ini. The task requires creating a scenario manually, as Bridge Command supports fully customizable scenario creation. Vessel names Guardian and Dorado components exist in maritime registries but specific operational SAR roles could not be independently verified.
